name: Ronan
teaser: Great menu, drinks, and crew. Don't skip the clams.
review: Chef Daniel Cutler took inspiration from the pizza Zach and Steve served at their beloved Sotto, but he's made it his own. Great menu, drinks, and crew. And I know this is all about pizza, but don't skip the clams.
headsUp: One of the most thoughtful menus in LA. Don't skip the starters.
update: Chef is still pushing the seasonal program hard.
address: 7315 Melrose Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90046, USA
hours: Monday: 5:30 – 9:00 PM · Tuesday: 5:30 – 9:00 PM · Wednesday: 5:30 – 9:00 PM · Thursday: 5:30 – 9:00 PM · Friday: 5:30 – 9:30 PM · Saturday: 5:00 – 9:30 PM · Sunday: 5:00 – 9:00 PM
